column1: # Controls how ZAP handles each alert type:
#   PASS  = ignore this finding (not applicable to our app)
#   WARN  = report it but don't fail the pipeline
# ── Rules set to WARN (report but don't fail) ─────────────────
# 10015 - Incomplete or No Cache-control Header (acceptable for API)
# 10096 - Timestamp Disclosure (low risk for public APIs)
# 10202 - Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens (critical for forms)
# 10016 - Web Browser XSS Protection Not Enabled
# 10024 - Information Disclosure - Sensitive Information in URL
# 10025 - Information Disclosure - Sensitive Information in HTTP Referrer Header

column3: (Information Disclosure - Sensitive Information in HTTP Referrer Header)
